repo.description: PyTorch implementation of Densely Connected Time Delay Neural Network

terms.context_snippet: PyTorch implementation of Densely Connected Time Delay Neural Network (D-TDNN) in our paper ["Densely Connected Time Delay Neural Network for Speaker Verification"](https://www.isca-speech.org/archive/Interspeech_2020/abstracts/1275.html) (INTERSPEECH 2020).
